policy.copyright_rule: Do not copy source text. Use these files only to extract NutriTail-owned structured rules, cautions, contraindications, and uncertainty logic.
policy.ranking_rule: Food ranking remains deterministic from Food V2 data and NutriTail rules. These references may support rule design and customer-facing explanations only.

priority_notes: Use textbook sources first for core clinical rules, then use these links as guideline, client-education, and cross-check support.
WSAVA and FEDIAF files in this folder are high-value for assessment, label interpretation, treats, BCS/MCS, and EU nutrient guidance.
Tufts-style veterinary nutrition articles are useful for customer-friendly safety wording and practical edge cases.
Pet Nutrition Alliance tools are useful for calorie, manufacturer-evaluation, and comparison workflow design.
FoodData Central datasets are human-food datasets and should not be used to rank pet foods; keep them reserved for future ingredient-level nutrient research only.
